{{Quote|That black-hearted turncoat Vader! This is how he honors his deals!|Brazzo|<ref name="Vader's Quest 1">[[Vader's Quest 1|''Vader's Quest'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''Brazzo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] on [[Centares/Legends|Centares]].

==Biography==
He was known to have learned the identity of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. He and his sister, [[Selle]], fled from [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who eventually caught them. He fired his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] at Vader, who deflected the bolt with [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] into Selle. Overcome with grief, Brazzo failed to dodge Vader's killing stroke.

{{Char-stub}}
